title: Technical Lead
arr_raw: Hybrid – BristolPermanent£65k-£80kCulture led and inclusive companyEligible for SC clearance If you have a background in Full-Stack development and have since moved into solution design and client facing work, then this could be the role for you. We (SR2) are working with one of our amazing Bristol based clients who are looking for a Technical Consultant who will sit at the heart of the company - you will be supporting teams as their technical authority, as well as designing solutions for clients and supporting the consultancies external stakeholders. We are looking for someone who combines deep technical expertise with strong client advisory skills and a passion for innovation - including AI-led solutions!This is a company who put culture and inclusivity at the heart of everything they do. A small team with a big impact, each person is valued for their individual contributions. They are culture led - so if you are looking for a role/company where you can work from home every single day and not get too involved in the culture, then this company is not the one for you!Overview Shape and define technical solutions during pre-sales cyclesStakeholder management for external consultancy clientsOwn estimations and support proposals and Statements of WorkTranslate ambitious ideas into robust, scalable technical architecturesDocument solution approaches clearly for technical and non-technical stakeholdersBring fresh thinking, including emerging technologies and AI, into client conversationsRun technical audits, discovery phases, and proof-of-conceptsAssess client technology landscapes and provide strategic recommendationsRequirements: Technical background as a Full-Stack Developer, ideally working across a range of tech stacksSignificant experience in a client-facing technical role (Technical Lead, Solution Architect, Technical Consultant, etc.)Strong pre-sales experience - solution definition, estimation, and technical presentationsConfidence advising and influencing senior stakeholdersExperience leading discoveries, assessments, and technical auditsCommercial awareness and the ability to clearly articulate scope, risk, and approachEligible for SC clearance = RTW in UK + living in UK for over 5 yearsPlease apply with a copy of your CV and Emma from SR2 will contact potential applicants regarding next steps.
